entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop species whose germplasm collection was analyzed for diversity

entities.name: GERMPLASM DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation within the genetic resources of a crop collection

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The observable physical and agronomic variation among accessions

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics used to describe the chickpea accessions

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the growth and yield performance of the crop

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The reaction of chickpea accessions to the fusarium wilt pathogen

entities.name: SEED COLOUR
entities.description: A morphological trait that showed the highest pooled diversity index

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait that showed the highest pooled diversity index

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The repository containing 16,820 accessions of chickpea germplasm

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A geographical region exhibiting the maximum range variation for all traits

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN REGION
entities.description: The primary center of diversity for chickpea

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region containing the secondary center of diversity for chickpea

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The specific location of the secondary center of diversity within Africa

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A geographical region analyzed for phenotypic variation

entities.name: AMERICAS
entities.description: A geographical region analyzed for phenotypic variation

entities.name: EUROPE
entities.description: A geographical region analyzed for phenotypic variation

entities.name: WEST ASIA
entities.description: A geographical region analyzed for phenotypic variation

entities.name: EAST ASIA
entities.description: A geographical region analyzed for phenotypic variation

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A statistical method used to quantify diversity across regions and traits

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A dimensionality reduction method used to analyze 13 traits

entities.name: CLUSTERING
entities.description: A method used to group geographical regions based on PC scores
